The '''Second Battle of Gelgelar''' saw the reclamation of supplies from the [[Hormuuz|captured Rebel base]] in the [[Gelgelar system/Legends|Gelgelar system]] from the [[Imperial Navy/Legends|Imperial Navy]] by the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]].

==The Battle==
[[Rogue Squadron/Legends|Rogue]] and [[Green Squadron (Rebel Alliance)/Legends|Green Squadrons]] spearheaded the assault; [[MC80 Liberty Type Heavy Star Cruiser/Legends|Calamari Cruiser]] [[Liberty/Legends|''Liberty'']] arrived soon after the fighter groups in the [[Gelgelar system/Legends|Gelgelar system]], engaging the [[Nebulon-B2 frigate]] ''[[Harpy]]''. Rogue Squadron launched their torpedoes at the ''Harpy'' as well, destroying or driving off the frigate and reducing the number of guns that could be trained at the incoming bombers and the ''Liberty''.

Green Squadron, piloting [[A/SF-01 B-wing starfighter/Legends|B-wing]] assault fighters, proceeded to attack the [[XQ5 Platform]] that was abandoned in the [[Evacuation of Gelgelar|first battle]] and knocked out its shields, eventually disabling it.

The [[Victory-class Star Destroyer/Legends|Victory-class Star Destroyer]] [[Stormhawk (Victory-class)|''Stormhawk'']] moved in to attack the ''Liberty'' and deployed its fighter craft. Heavy torpedo attacks were made against the [[Mon Calamari/Legends|Mon Calamari]] warship by [[TIE/sa tactical bomber/Legends|TIE/sa bombers]] and [[Alpha-class Xg-1 Star Wing/Legends|Assault Gunboats]], but the counterattack was ultimately repelled by Rogue Squadron. ''Stormhawk'' was neutralized by concerted Rebel fire, removing the Imperials' largest source of offensive firepower in the system.

After a Rogue [[T-65 X-wing starfighter/Legends|T-65 X-wing starfighter]] performed a sensor inspection of the containers left behind by the Alliance in their earlier retreat from the system, four [[Heavy Lifter/Legends|Heavy Lifters]] from the [[Flight group/Legends|flight group]] Weevil arrived to pick up the containers. Once the Weevil craft had made the jump to [[Hyperspace/Legends|hyperspace]] with the reclaimed supplies, ''Liberty'' and the starfighter groups withdrew from the system.

==Aftermath==
This victory was vital to the Alliance, as it secured a vast number of supplies previously thought lost to the Imperial occupation force. It ensured the operational readiness of the Rebel Alliance in the [[Airam sector/Legends|Airam sector]].

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: X-Wing vs. TIE Fighter: Balance of Power Campaigns]]'' {{1st}}
